notes: All 15 Enterprise tactics confirmed from the authoritative source at v19.1. Cross-checked two independent pages that agreed exactly: the version-pinned page (https://attack.mitre.org/versions/v19/tactics/enterprise/) and the live tactics list (https://attack.mitre.org/tactics/enterprise/), both of which report "ATT&CK v19.1" as the current version. The v19 split of the former Defense Evasion is present and verified: TA0005 is now "Stealth" (renamed from Defense Evasion) and TA0112 "Defense Impairment" is the newly separated tactic. Both split tactics were additionally confirmed on their individual pages (https://attack.mitre.org/tactics/TA0005/ -> Stealth; https://attack.mitre.org/tactics/TA0112/ -> Defense Impairment). IDs are non-sequential by design (TA numbers reflect historical assignment order, not matrix column order); the ordering above follows the Enterprise matrix column order. No fabrication or unconfirmed elements.
